name: my-dockerized-app
description: A sample Node.js application deployed via GitHub Actions and Terraform.

scripts.build: echo 'Building application...' && mkdir -p dist && cp src/* dist/ || true && echo 'Build complete: dist directory created.'
scripts.test: echo "No specific tests configured. Consider adding Jest/Mocha." && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo "No specific linting configured. Consider adding ESLint." && exit 0
